MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th March, 1997 ■ G .S.R . 173(E).— In exorcise o f the powers conferred by section 8 o f the Cinem atograph A ct, 1952 (37 o f 1952) read with sub-rule (9) o f rule 22 and sub-rule (9) o f rule 24 o f the Cinem atograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, the Central Governm ent hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cinem atograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, nam ely:— 1. S h o rt title and com m encem ent.— (1) These rules may be called the Cinematograph (Certification) (Amend m ent) R ules, 1997. . (2) They shall come into force with effect from the 1st May 1997. 2. In the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, in the Second Schedule, for From V lll, the following shall be substituted, namely;— FORM v i n [See rules 22(9) and 24(9)] CENTRAL BOARD OF FILM CERTIFICATION R e p o rt of M em ber of Exam iniDg/Revising C om m ittee N.B. :— Please study the guidelines issued by Government once again before you preview the film. Title o f the film and language—-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ---- Colour/Black and White Length o f the time— — (minutes) Reels --------- — C a s s e t t e ™ — — Gauge— ■ ------ Date o f examination— ------- — -Name o f the member - ---------- , 1. I certify that I have carefully examined the above film with reference to the guidelines. I rceonimend refusal o f certificate to the film. OR -- 3 of 6 -- I recommend the grant o f following certificate to the film: ■ ■ 'U '/'U A '/'A rS' with excisions or/and modifications without excisions or/and modifications IDelete whichever is not applicable] 1. In the ease o f grant o f 'S' certificate, please specify the class or group o f persons which should constitute the specialised iudiences:— \ THE GAZETTE OF IN D IA ; EXTRAORDINARY [Part II— Se c . 3(i)] [II. Reasons forreftisal o f certificate or grant of'UA'/'A'/'S' certificate. Note:— 'U'— Unrestricted public exhibition. 'U A '~ U nrestricted public exhibition with an endorsem ent that it is necessary to caution that the question as to w h eth er any child below the age o f tw elve y ears may be allow ed to see the film should be considered by the parents or guardian o f such child. 'A'— Public exbibitioa restricted to adults. 'S'— Public exhW tion restricted to members of any profession or any class of persons. IV. Details o f excisions/modifications (Please see notes below) S17~ Reel ' ~ Clear and specific description Reasons with specific No. No. o f excisions or modifications reference to guidelines V. Thematic classification (only in the case o f feature films):— VI. Any other remarks (including justification for permitting certain visuals and/or words prim a facie appear to be objec tionable) VII. I certify that there would be no infraction o f the guidelines if the film is granted a certificate as recommended above. I also certify that the film has been judged in its entirety from the point o f view o f its overall impact; that the fihn has been L'xamined in the light o f the period depicted in the film and contemporary standards o f the country and the people to which the i'ilm relates; and that the film does not deprave the morality o f the people. I certify that while recommending the film for unrestricted public exhibition I have satisfied m yself that the film is uitable for family viewing, including children. , Signature---------- — — — - -- 4 of 6 -- ['TFT 3( i ) ] V [ M ^ : araTtTTT^ Note : 1. While recommending excisions the beginning and end o f tiie excision siiould be clearly described and the length o f the excision may be given as a percentage o f the total scene or in metres/feet. 2. If a scene or sequence is to be reduced to a flash, only 1/2 to 1 metre will be kept in the film. 3. Also if certain portions are to be completely deleted while reducing a scene or sequence these should b? specified. [File No. 802/6/95-F(C)] RAGHU MENON, Jt. Secy. Foot Note;— The principal rules were published, vide No. GSR 381 (E) dated 9-5-83 in the Extraordinary Gazette o f India Part II Section (i) and subsequently amended by: (i) GSR 83 (E) dated 28-2-84; (ii) GSR 413 (E) dated 29^5-84; (iii) GSR 814 (E) dated 13-12-84; (iv) GSR 772 dated 21-10-89; (V) GSR 702 (E) dated 27-11-91; (Vi) GSR 67 (E) dated 30-1-92; (vii) GSR 603 (E) dated 3-8-94; (viii) GSR 816 (E) dated 16-11-94; (ix) GSR 817 (E) dated 16-11-94; (X) GSR. 121 (E) dated 11-3-95; (X .) GSR 370 (E) dated 28-4-95; (xii) GSR 705 (E) dated 30-10-95; (xiii) GSR 798 (E) dated 15-12-95; (xiv) GSR 134 (:E) dated 18-3-96, Printed by th e M anager.
